page: Amazon Web Services r8idn.large is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with 2 threads per core, running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core.

This instance includes 118 GB of local NVMe SSD storage as instance store volumes. It operates on the Nitro hypervisor and is optimized for both network and Elastic Block Store (EBS) performance. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 3 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

From a resource density perspective, the r8idn.large provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per vCPU, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring significant memory capacity relative to compute resources. The inclusion of local NVMe SSD storage provides high-speed local scratch space. This server is suited for memory-intensive applications, database caching layers, and small-scale database workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.large is a memory-optimized instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, running on an Intel x86_64 processor at 3.9 GHz. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance is network and EBS optimized, offering a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. It includes 118 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, providing fast local read and write capabilities. With a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per vCPU, the r8idn.large offers a balanced profile for memory-intensive tasks without the overhead of larger compute allocations. This instance is suited for database caching, small-scale database hosting, and memory-bound enterprise applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-speed local NVMe SSD storage, and optimized network performance.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel processor
16.0 GB of system memory optimized for memory-bound tasks
118 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store storage
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor integration
Suited for database caching and memory-intensive workloads
